title: Home Potions
body:
Tired of walking back to your base? Home Potions adds two simple teleport potions to get you where you need to go.

### What This Mod Does

Two potion items that work just like regular potions:

- **Return Potion**: Takes you to the world spawn point
- **Recall Potion**: Takes you to your bed. Falls back to spawn if you haven't set a respawn point

Right-click and hold to use, just like regular potions. You'll get an empty glass bottle back (unless you're in creative mode). Includes portal particles and enderman teleport sounds for that classic teleportation feel.

### Why You Should Download This

- Quick way to get back home without the long walk
- Simple and intuitive - just drink a potion
- Two options for different situations
- Works across dimensions and keeps your facing direction

NOTE: This mod was originally created for my own mod pack project.
